Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class ListVerifierImpl<L extends List<E>,​E>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifier<ListVerifier<L,​E>,​ListValidator<L,​E>,​L>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.ListVerifierImpl<L,​E>
Type Parameters:
L - the type of the list
E - the type of elements in the list
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleCollectionVerifier<ListVerifier<L,​E>,​L,​E>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<ListVerifier<L,​E>,​L>, ListVerifier<L,​E>
public final class ListVerifierImpl<L extends List<E>,​E>
extends AbstractObjectVerifier<ListVerifier<L,​E>,​ListValidator<L,​E>,​L>
implements ListVerifier<L,​E>
An implementation of ListVerifier.
